(1) These rules may be called the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Second Amendment Rules, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. -- 3 of 5 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEc. 3(1)] 2. In the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989,— (1) for Schedule 1, the following Schedule shall be substituted, namely:— “SCHEDULE 1 (See Rule 3) Sr. Headquarters of the Bench of Territorial jurisdiction of the Bench No. the Railway Claims Tribunal (1) (2) (3) 1. Ahmedabad Gujarat, Union Territory of Diu. 2. Amaravati Andhra Pradesh. 3. Bengaluru Karnataka. 4. Bhopal Madhya Pradesh and Chhattisgarh. 5. Bhubaneshwar Odisha. 6. Chandigarh Punjab, Haryana, Himachal Pradesh, Jammu and Kashmir and Union Territory of Chandigarh. 7. Chennai (i) Tamil Nadu and Union Territory of Puducherry. Delhi Union Territory of Delhi. 9. Ernakulam Kerala and Union Territory of Lakshadweep. 10. Ghaziabad Districts of Agra, Bulandshahar, Moradabad, Bijnore, Mathura, Ghaziabad, Meerut, Aligarh, Saharanpur, Jyotiba Phule Nagar (Amroha), Bagpat, Etah, Firozabad, Gautam Budh Nagar (Noida), Maha Maya Nagar (Hathras), Muzaffar Nagar, Rampur, Pilibhit and Mainpuri of the State of Uttar Pradesh and Districts of Haridwar and Dehradun of the State of Uttaranchal. 11. Gorakhpur Districts of Gorakhpur, Deoria, Ballia, Gazipur, Azamgarh, Mau, Basti, Siddharthanagar, Mirzapur, Robertsganj, Jaunpur, Faizabad, Gonda, Bahraich, Varanasi, Maharajganj, Kushinagar, Shravasti, Sant Kabir Nagar, Chandauli, Sant Ravi Das Nagar, Balrampur and Ambedkar Nagar of Uttar Pradesh. 12. Guwahati (2) Assam, Sikkim, Mizoram, Arunachal Pradesh, Tripura, Manipur, Meghalaya, Nagaland. 13. Jaipur Rajasthan. 14. Kolkata West Bengal, Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands. 15. Lucknow (2) All Districts of Uttar Pradesh except those included in column (3) against serial number 10 and 11. 16. Mumbai (2) (i) Districts of Mumbai, Thane, Palghar, Raigad, Pune, Nasik, Ahmednagar, Satara, Ratnagiri, Sindhudurg, Kolhapur, Sangli, Solapur, Dhule, Nandurbar, Aurangabad and Beed of Maharashtra. (ii) Union Territories of Dadra, Daman and Nagar Havell. (111) Goa. 17. Nagpur All Districts of Maharashtra except those included In item () of column (3) against serial number 16. 18. Patna Bihar. 19. Ranchi Jharkhand. 20. Secunderabad Telangana.” -- 4 of 5 -- [art ars 3(i) | UR HT UTA; STATA 5 (2) In Schedule 1A, for serial number 3 and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely:— (1) (2) (3) (4) (5) “3, South Zone Vice-Chairman (Judicial) Chennai Amaravati Bengaluru Chennai Ernakulam Secunderabad”. oO PN NY FY N [F. No. 2016/TC(RCT)/1-13] RAVINESH KUMAR, Executive Director (Public Grievances) Note : The principal rules were published vide notification 19" September, 1989 and subsequently amended as follows:- G.S.R. 700(E), dated the 26" November, 1991: G.S.R. 438(E), dated the 21“ April, 1992; G.S.R. 509(E), dated the 15"" June, 1994; G.S.R. 270(E), dated the 4" July, 1996; G.S.R. 59(E), dated the 4" February, 1997; G.S.R. 719(E), dated the 15" October, 1999; G.S.R. 167(E), dated the 29" February, 2000; G.S.R. 513(E), dated the 9™ July, 2001; G.S.R. 787(E), dated the 2nd December, 2002; 10. 11. 12. 13. 14. 15. 16. 17.
